title: cremanthodium dissectum
intro: Cremanthodium dissectum, also known as the dissected cremanthodium or Alpine Goldenrod, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its sesquiterpene lactones and triterpenoids. The health benefits of Cremanthodium dissectum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
